mapper.insert: /* oms-master-renewal-directive-sql-oracle.xml - insertHistAsrtRenewal */ INSERT INTO TORDER_HIST_ASRT ( OWKEY ,ASRTKEY ,ASRTREPKEY ,ASRTNM ,SMLCTG ,QTY ,ICIMGURL ,ICCOLOR ,ICDESIGN ,ICCHRT ,ASRTSTATUS ,CMT ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT OWKEY ,ASRTKEY ,ASRTREPKEY ,ASRTNM ,SMLCTG ,QTY ,ICIMGURL ,ICCOLOR ,ICDESIGN ,ICCHRT ,ASRTSTATUS ,CMT ,TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 입력 일시 */ ,'BATCH' /* 입력자 */ ,TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 수정 일시 */ ,'BATCH' /* 수정자 */ FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT A WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ASRTKEY =#{bfchgickey}
